evals.prompt: Review this SaaS agreement against our playbook and propose redlines for liability, indemnity, IP, and termination.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-legal/contract-review because the main deliverable is broad contract review and redlining across multiple clause families.

evals.prompt: We received a data subject access request from an EU employee and need to confirm the response timeline, exemption checks, and process steps.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-legal/legal-compliance because the request is operational privacy compliance work rather than contract redlining.

evals.prompt: Review the DPA attached to this vendor agreement and tell me whether the transfer clauses and breach timing are compliant before we sign.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-legal/legal-compliance because the real question is privacy-compliance sufficiency of DPA obligations and transfer mechanics.
